description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a dark gable roof and a prominent front porch, surrounded by mature trees and a well-maintained yard. The front facade includes a covered porch with white railings and outdoor seating, leading to a paved walkway. The house is set within a fenced lot, with a mix of grass and paved surfaces, and a driveway or sidewalk at the front. The rear of the property offers a private green space with additional outdoor furniture, ideal for gatherings or relaxation. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The overall design reflects a Craftsman influence, with a cozy, inviting appearance and practical outdoor spaces.
description: A single-story Craftsman-style bungalow with a dark gable roof, front porch, and surrounding trees, set within a fenced yard with both paved and grassy areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and paved walkway flanked by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, side windows, and the depth of the lot with trees along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, outdoor seating area, and the fenced boundary with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain side wall, roofline, and additional trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
